description: Cheap frigate combat fundamentals before expensive specialization.
recommended_for: Pilots who want to learn PvP with low replacement cost.

required_skills.name: Power Grid Management
required_skills.reason: Improves fitting room on almost every ship.
required_skills.economic_impact: Fits cheaper practical ships without overpaying for modules.

required_skills.name: CPU Management
required_skills.economic_impact: Makes beginner fits easier and cheaper.

warnings: Do not jump directly into expensive PvP hulls; learn in cheap frigates first.
